enriched_points.expanded_content: Optical remote sensing utilizes satellite imagery to identify and analyze archaeological features, enhancing visibility beyond traditional ground surveys.
Remote sensing technologies have led to the identification of previously unmarked ancient Egyptian sites, revealing hidden historical landscapes that were once thought lost.
The integration of remote sensing in archaeology has transformed our understanding of ancient Egyptian civilization, providing new insights into settlement patterns and cultural practices.
